title: Product context document
description: Layer 3 — product-layer record of rationale, overrides, and extensions. See spec/product-context.md.

rationale.description: Why this product-layer working copy exists (e.g. feature name, project, team).

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the document was first created.

overrides.description: Overrides of foundation or platform tokens.

extensions.description: Net-new tokens and components added at this layer.

tokens.description: New token objects. Each item MUST conform to token.schema.json.

components.description: New component objects. Each item MUST conform to component.schema.json.

override.description: A product-layer value override of an existing token.

uuid.description: UUID of the token being overridden. MUST match a token in the merged cascade.

value.description: The overriding value. MUST be type-compatible with the original token value type.

rationale.description: Why this specific value was chosen.
